C o n f i d e n t i a l
intended LSE Main Market announcement post‑signing subject to FCA guidance
C o n f i d e n t i a l Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Grayshore Capital Markets Ltd by Larkmere Analytics plc (Ref: T/ S H — 1 9 8 2 7).
Structure & consideration: Larkmere to acquire 100% of the ordinary shares for £84,750,000 cash; intended LSE Main Market announcement post‑signing subject to FCA guidance.

Cross‑border transfers: Data‑Export Approval DEA‑GB/SG‑003 granted 03‑Jun‑2026 for payroll sub‑processor in Singapore; despite approval, no live PII transfers will occur before Closing and prior test files were synthetic.
Financing & funds flow: deposit £4,000,000 into escrow at Exchange House Escrows Ltd; account ref ESCROW‑GB‑LME‑0X9q; url‑based instruction https://portal.example/tx/AX9‑LME‑0X9q.
